changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vehicle ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
registration_number VARCHAR(20), vin VARCHAR(50),
make VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, model VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, variant VARCHAR(100),
year_of_manufacture INTEGER,
fuel_type VARCHAR(50), transmission VARCHAR(50), engine_capacity INTEGER,
colour VARCHAR(50), number_of_doors INTEGER, body_type VARCHAR(50), co2_emissions INTEGER,
current_mileage BIGINT, first_registration_date DATE, previous_owners INTEGER, mot_expiry_date DATE, tax_expiry_date DATE,
owner_keycloak_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE vehicle IS 'Core vehicle identity and current snapshot. Historical data lives in vehicle_*_history tables.';
